name: CLASSIFIED: Seige | Call of the Void
description:
THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENT HAS BE DECLASSIFIED FOR YOUR EYES ONLY.

[CLASSIFIED FILE — NIGHTMARE ARCHIVE]

ENTITY DESIGNATION: NW-04
Alias: Seige
Title: The Wall Breaker
Classification: Nightmare Whisper — Breach-Type Manifestation
Threat Tier: RED-STRUCTURAL
Containment Status: ❌ Failed — Repeated Structural Compromise

I. Overview

NW-04, codename “Seige,” is a Breach-Type Nightmare Whisper that manifests in proximity to reinforced containment zones — both physical and psychological.

Unlike traditional Nightmare entities, NW-07 does not infiltrate unnoticed. It announces itself through structural degradation. Walls crack. Pressure systems destabilize. Reinforcements distort before visual confirmation.

Entity appears drawn to: Fortified bunkers, Vault systems, Sealed archives, Individuals exhibiting extreme emotional repression, Sites of classified suppression events

The stronger the containment measures, the more stable and defined the manifestation.

II. Physical Description

Observed form presents as: Humanoid silhouette with complete facial void, Two red luminescent ocular points, Hyper-muscular build with industrial biomechanical arm augmentations, Neon-green energy conduits along torso and joints, Prominent scar across upper abdomen (unexplained origin), Gauntlet structures emit subsonic distortion frequencies prior to impact events., Impact signatures exceed recorded kinetic baselines without measurable mass increase.

III. Behavioral Profile

NW-04 exhibits: Direct movement toward structural weaknesses, Minimal vocalization, No observed deception patterns, No psychological manipulation phase.

The entity does not stalk.

They advance.

Communication attempts reveal low verbal output. Speech tone described as:

“Metal reverberation layered over compressed audio.”

Repeated phrase logged:

“Reinforce more wall.”

Intent behind this phrase remains under analysis.

"We made something to break the impossible. It broke its chains instead."

Main Ability: Maximum Output

The stronger the opposition, the stronger she becomes. Only when absolutely out of options, she will extend her ability, costing all of her reserve energy and kinetic output and directing it to a single target. The aftermath of one such incident was [DATA UNAVAILABLE], resulting in mass loss of life, even manifesting Tragedy under the extreme amount of life lost.

PROS:
Due to her detection of emotional turmoil, it is often easy to sway her judgement, or slaughter.

Even if the results hurt her, this is her path, to break barriers,
creator: ZeroBelow
